campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review a monthly financial report from the regional transit authority for March 2026, adopt a new policy about how city property can be used, and discuss current job openings and hiring efforts for city positions.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's March 2026 investment report
New policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities
City job vacancies and recruitment strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing about cleaning up hazardous conditions on properties identified by the County and voted to move forward with the cleanup work. The council also adopted a new technology policy for the city and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property abatement ordered by the County
New Technology Disruption Policy replacing previous version
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records and meeting minutes, review the town's March finances, and authorize the Town Manager to accept donations, sign service agreements, award a paving contract, and apply for state grants. The Council also adopted a list of projects for the 2026-2027 fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized O'Grady Paving construction contract
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Submitted grant applications for statewide funding
Adopted 2026-2027 fiscal year project list

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and reviewed items for their June 2 agenda, while also updating work plans for the Neighborhood Services and Education Committee and the Rules and Open Government Committee.
keyTopics: May 26 council meeting cancelled
June 2 draft agenda items and scheduling
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Approval of various city-sponsored events

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve previous meeting minutes, hear public comments from residents, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. Council members also discussed upcoming agendas and reports from various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period for residents
City board and commission agenda planning

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held their May 19th evening meeting to conduct regular city business. The council recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month as special observances during the meeting.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department for their work on infrastructure and services during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Update to Health and Safety Element of the General Plan
Recognition of Public Works teams (roads, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation, sustainability)
Celebration of Asian American Pacific Islander Month
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara held a special meeting of the Station Area Task Force on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss plans related to the station area development. The meeting was open to the public both in person and via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Public meeting held at City Hall, 1500 Warburton Avenue
Remote participation available via Zoom

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings and made important decisions on May 19, 2026, including passing new rules (ordinances), approving a property development permit amendment, confirming a special assessment, and hiring a new permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance passed to address an immediate city need
Property development permit amendment approved for a site plan
Special assessment confirmed for a local improvement project
Permanent City Manager appointed to lead city operations

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric appliances and heating systems in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations from the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update - where the city stands on converting homes to electric systems
Proposed principles for electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements driving the electrification push
